title: dalea helleri
intro: Dalea helleri, also known as Heller's prairie clover, is a perennial legume native to the United States and Canada, characterized by its pink or white flowers and feathery foliage. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties due to its high content of flavonoids and saponins. Consuming Dalea helleri is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, or used as a dried powder or capsule in herbal supplements.
